## Summary

## Scope

- [ ] Protocol/schema change
- [ ] Reference server change
- [ ] Client change
- [ ] Docs/spec change
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Governance/release material

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm check:schema`
- [ ] `pnpm check:sdk-contracts`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo build --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`

## Security, Privacy, and Consent Notes

Does this change affect consent validation, context exposure, audit logging,
provenance, sensitivity, freshness, or memory writes?

## Documentation

List updated docs/specs, or explain why no docs were needed.
